# Project Synthesis Report

**Plan:** `2026-03-05-synthesis-strategic-rework`  
**Date:** 2026-03-05  
**Status:** COMPLETE  
**Generated by:** Head of Operations (Synthesis Agent)

---

## Executive Summary

This plan resolved all five strategic observations carried forward from the `2026-03-05-hubl-high-feasibility-rework-1` synthesis. The session delivered two high-impact quality improvements and three lower-priority housekeeping fixes:

1. **WP-001 — Test Suite Namespace Standardisation:** 136 test files across 17 directories were standardised to the canonical `MailcodeTests\{Suite}[\{SubDir}]` namespace and `*Tests.php` filename convention. This eliminated all 113 PHPUnit class-not-found warnings and exposed 204 previously-invisible tests, raising the verified passing count from 315 to **519**.

2. **WP-002 — PHPStan Violation Resolution:** All 7 remaining PHPStan level-9 violations were resolved across 5 source files with targeted, zero-suppression fixes. The project is clean at PHPStan level 9 across 528 scanned files.

3. **WP-003 — api-surface.md Type Syntax Audit:** A full audit of `api-surface.md` confirmed a single PHP 8 native union type entry (`ClassCache::findClassesInFolder()`). It was corrected to PHP 7.4-compatible docblock form matching the actual source signature.

4. **WP-004 — TimezoneTrait Inline Comment:** A 3-line inline comment was added to `hasExplicitTimezone()` documenting the parse-time vs translate-time fresh-lookup rationale — preserving design intent across future maintainers.

5. **WP-005 — ContainsStatementBuilder Docblock Fix:** The constructor PHPDoc was updated from the legacy underscore-delimited class name to the current short class name.

All acceptance criteria across all 5 work packages were met. No regressions were introduced.

## Technical Debt Identified

These items were flagged by agents during the session but are outside the scope of this plan.

| Priority | Area | Issue |
|---|---|---|
| Medium | `phpunit.xml` | Deprecated PHPUnit 13 XML attributes (`convertErrorsToExceptions`, `convertNoticesToExceptions`, `convertWarningsToExceptions`) produce one deprecation notice per test run. Should be removed in a dedicated PHPUnit 13 compatibility maintenance pass. |
| Medium | `tests/testsuites/` | Some auto-patched file headers have cosmetic double blank lines between `<?php` and `declare(strict_types=1)`. A single `php-cs-fixer` pass would normalise the entire corpus. |
| Low | `src/Mailcode/Commands/LogicKeywords.php` | `ERROR_KEYWORD_SUBSTRING_NOT_FOUND` is a declared-but-unused public constant after WP-002 removed the dead branch that referenced it. Retaining it preserves the public API contract; it should be marked `@deprecated` and removed in the next major version. |
| Low | `src/Mailcode/ClassCache.php` | `findClassesInFolder()` takes `$folder` as an untyped parameter (no native PHP type hint). A future cleanup pass could add a native `string\|FolderInfo` union type hint once PHP 8 is the minimum supported runtime. |

---

## Strategic Recommendations (Gold Nuggets)

### 1. Establish a PHPUnit 13 Compatibility Ticket

The one remaining per-run noise item is `phpunit.xml`'s deprecated attributes. This is a one-line fix but deserves a dedicated WP so it is properly tracked, tested, and documented before PHPUnit 13 enforcement becomes blocking.

### 2. Run php-cs-fixer as a One-Time Formatting Pass

The WP-001 automation produced cosmetically inconsistent file headers (double blank lines). Scheduling a single `php-cs-fixer` pass (or equivalent PSR-12 formatter) across `tests/testsuites/` would produce a clean, uniform corpus with zero risk to functionality.

### 3. Update Plan Baselines When Test Counts Change

WP-001 revealed that the visible test count (315 → 519) was a lagging indicator. Future plan acceptance criteria must use `composer test` to determine the live baseline before writing AC, not historical figures from previous plans.

### 4. Consider Marking `ERROR_KEYWORD_SUBSTRING_NOT_FOUND` Deprecated

The constant is now unreachable dead code in production logic (the only consuming branch was removed in WP-002). Tagging it `@deprecated` in a maintenance release and removing it at the next major semver boundary is the cleanest path to full elimination.

### 5. Formalise the Translation Coverage Table

`constraints.md` documents HubL translation coverage as intentionally partial. As the translator grows, maintaining a machine-readable or structured table (rather than prose) will make coverage gaps auditable at a glance. This is a low-cost documentation improvement with high long-term value for contributors.
